title: Credit unions managing $25B in assets join stablecoin infrastructure program
summary: A new pilot from Stablecore, Circuit and Curql gives participating US credit unions access to test stablecoin payments and other digital asset services.

title: Binance withdraws Greece-filed MiCA application
summary: Binance said it plans to seek authorization in another EU jurisdiction just days ahead of the July 1 MiCA deadline, as unlicensed crypto firms are expected to wind down activities in the bloc.

title: Wendy’s Soars 42% Following Viral Reddit Post
summary: The meme-stock crowd is rallying behind another beaten up American icon — Wendy’s Co., the fast-food chain known for the Frosty, Dave’s Triple burger and the Biggie Deal.

title: Sunrun Surges Over 30% on Tesla Deal to Supply Power for AI
summary: Sunrun Inc.’s stock jumped as much as 31% after the home solar provider announced it will partner with Tesla Inc. and Renew Home to provide power for data centers and utilities across the US.

title: Strategy (MSTR) Stock Falls Below $100 for First Time Since March 2024
summary:

title: OpenAI Turns Up the Heat With Jalapeño, Its First Custom AI Chip
summary: Built with Broadcom, the LLM-focused accelerator is the first step in OpenAI's effort to design the hardware behind ChatGPT and beyond.

title: Trump Cancels Signing of Bipartisan Housing Bill Containing CBDC Ban: 'Of Minor Importance'
summary: President Trump said he won’t sign the popular bill until Congress passes a controversial bill restricting voting rights.

title: Sports-based prediction markets app Onyx Odds raises $20 million in round led by Kraken parent Payward
summary: The app will face stiff competition in the prediction markets space, competing with dominant market leaders Kalshi and Polymarket.

title: World Cup boom sends Polymarket volume up 300% while Kalshi sets open interest records
summary: Kalshi's aggregated OI reached a record $1.16 billion last week, the first time the platform’s OI surpassed the billion-dollar mark.

title: Venezuela to reveal $240bn debt pile in world’s largest restructuring
summary: Caracas to disclose it has much more borrowing than expected after overthrow of Maduro

title: Is this teenage girl North Korea’s next dictator?
summary: Emergence of Kim Jong Un’s daughter at many public events fuels speculation that she is being lined up as a leader
